free_text: -CROSS SECTIONS FOR PRODUCTION OF GAMMA-RAYS BY
NEUTRONS OF 5 MEV, 6.6 MEV AND 8.7 MEV ON NITROGEN,
VAN DER GRAAFF, 12 MV, PULSED AT 2.5 MHZ,
DEUTERIUM BEAM ON DEUTERIUM GAS TARGET.
10 CM BY 10 CM NAI(TL) CRYSTAL SCINTILLATOR
PLACED AT 126 CM FROM THE SAMPLE AT 90 DEGREES TO
DISCRIMINATION BETWEEN GAMMAS AND NEUTRONS WAS MADE
BY TIME OF FLIGHT, THE PROMPT GAMMAS SEPERATED FROM
THE DELAYED PEAK OF SCATTERED NEUTRONS.
THE DETECTOR WAS CALIBRATED WITH STANDARD RADIOACTIVE
MONITORED WITH A PROTON RECOIL TELESCOPE.
AND SELF SCATTERING OF NEUTRONS IN THE SAMPLE.
.UNCERTAINTIES IN SOLID ANGLE AND SAMPLE THICKNESS
DETECTOR EFFICIENCY ABOUT 5 PC BELOW 2 MEV AND 15
PC ABOVE 2 MEV. PRINCIPAL ERROR IS FROM NEUTRON FLUX
TOTAL ERROR FROM COMBINATION OF ALL CONTRIBUTIO
IN QUADRATURE IS GIVEN IN TABLES.
.DISTILLED WATER IN THIN ALUMINIUM CONTIANERS, 10 CM
